title: Artificial Intelligence-Powered Digital Twins for Sustainable and Resilient Engineering Structures
task: 结构健康监测与退化预测
inputData: 传感器数据+仿真数据+材料试验数据
abstract: This work examines the application of novel AI tools to enable Digital Twins (DT) for engineering structures, providing a comprehensive solution for life-cycle management. A comprehensive state-of-the-art review is conducted to explore existing advancements in sensing, inspection, and simulation that are fundamental to the development of digital twins. A framework is proposed to define Digital Twins for Engineering (DT4ENG) based on their emphasis and data flow, including forward DT, backward DT, and DT-informed decision making. A case study on floating offshore wind turbine (FOWT) structures demonstrates the application of DT4ENG, with findings that have broader implications for the life-cycle management of engineering structures. The study reveals that AI effectively enables digital twins to identify potential structure issues, predict deterioration, and suggest timely maintenance interventions.
methodology: 本文提出DT4ENG框架，将数字孪生分为三类：（1）前向DT——从实时监测数据出发，通过多物理场仿真（OpenFAST）、载荷传递分析和概率退化模型预测结构未来状态；（2）后向DT——融合预测模型、检测结果和监测数据，利用物理信息神经网络（PINN）和动态贝叶斯网络（DBN）进行诊断分析并更新数字孪生模型；（3）DT驱动决策——基于动态POMDP和强化学习（A3C多智能体框架）优化维护策略。案例研究针对模块化能源岛上的漂浮式海上风电塔筒法兰连接高强螺栓，整合风浪数据（墨西哥湾）、材料试验数据、概率腐蚀疲劳模型和多物理场仿真进行腐蚀疲劳退化预测。
results: 案例研究表明，最关键螺栓在底部法兰的疲劳裂纹扩展中，Mode-3失效（第一啮合螺纹）占失效概率的74.7%，Mode-1和Mode-2分别占20.3%和5.0%，表明第一啮合螺纹处疲劳裂纹萌生和扩展最为严重。随服役时间推移，裂纹深度分布向46.8 mm临界阈值右移，接近20年服役期时裂纹深度趋向于集中在临界尺寸附近。研究揭示了主动在线监测和预防性维护策略的必要性，验证了DT4ENG框架在工程结构全生命周期管理中的有效性。
contribution: 提出DT4ENG框架（前向DT、后向DT、DT驱动决策），以AI赋能数字孪生实现工程结构的全生命周期管理，并通过漂浮式海上风电塔螺栓腐蚀疲劳退化案例验证了框架有效性
markdownFile: Tang et al. - 2024 - Artificial Intelligence-Powered Digital Twins for Sustainable and Resilient Engineering Structures.md
pdfFile: Tang et al. - 2024 - Artificial Intelligence-Powered Digital Twins for Sustainable and Resilient Engineering Structures.pdf
taskEn: Structural health monitoring and degradation prediction
inputDataEn: Sensor data + simulation data + material test data
